nasb.text: In peace I will both lie down and sleep, For You alone, O Lord, make me to dwell in safety.

esv.text: In peace I will both lie down and sleep; for you alone, O Lord, make me dwell in safety.

cnv.text: 我必平平安安躺下睡覺， 因為只有你耶和華能使我安然居住。

ccb.text: 只有你耶和华使我安然居住， 我必高枕无忧。

csbs.text: 我必在平安中躺下并睡着； 因为唯独你——耶和华啊， 你使我安然居住！
